full_text:
Xu Xuan (Baojian) 徐宣 (寶堅)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Xuan (徐宣), styledBaojian (寶堅), was born in Guangling. Refused Sun Ce, handled many state affairs for Cao Rui. Held a number of posts. Xu Xuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
